phase_of_buildout: Phase B step 1 — first unified ledger Box landed (temporal_continuity)
core_rule: Know what phase you're in before proposing structural change.

current_phase.name: Phase B — Sub-agents
current_phase.step_1_complete: first unified Box landed at LEDGERS/BOXES/temporal_continuity/
current_phase.exit_pending: all 5 draft graduations + LEDGERS/AGENTS/global_ledger_steward/ reorg + missing-ledger Boxes + runnable wiring per PHASE.md §4 exit criteria

phase_map.name: Phase C — Subagent Boxes + Reactive Box Network Runtime

phase_a.purpose: Author the project's full memory spine. Every architectural pattern future work depends on must be named, written down, cross-referenced before sub-agents (Phase B) or runtime (Phase C).

exit_criteria.name: Box Bus Ledger active (wire shape; runtime deferred to Phase C)
High-risk Page Ledgers authored (boxes, intake, automation, delegations, settings page)
Every active ledger registered in INDEX + GLOBAL §8

deferred_explicitly_out_of_phase_a: 9 lower-risk Page Ledgers (grid, leads, clients, coworkers, contacts, venues, briefing, activity, analytics)
phase_a.deferred_note: Their absence does NOT block Phase A exit.
do_not_leak_rules: No runtime work (no router, propagation ledger, T1/T2/T3 interpreters, validation enforcement, cycle enforcement) — DEC-2026-04-29-013
No sub-agent graduations — 5 draft packages at /Subagent Boxes/ stay drafts
No new Box class authoring beyond ledger work needs
phase_a.rationale: Phasing rule protects against half-finished architecture (per DEC-2026-04-29-008). Building bus before interpreters is wiring without engines. Phase A's job: every future phase has stable target.

history.event: Phase A started (Phases 1-5: Global, Temporal Continuity, North Star, File Directory, Open Problems)

Phase A wrapping (Phases 6-21 in rapid succession: Communications, Decisions, Box Ledger, DoD, Box Bus, Source-of-Truth, Connections, File Contents, Asset/Widget Map, Settings, 5 Page Ledgers, Phase Ledger)

phase_b.purpose: Graduate 5 draft sub-agent packages at /Subagent Boxes/ into runnable app agents under CCAgentindex/agents/<name>/. Author additional sub-agents for ledgers without a draft yet. Each becomes the operator that reads/updates a specific ledger.
scope: Graduate: file_directory, north_star, open_problems, temporal_continuity (global_ledger already done) → runnable
Author and graduate: communications, decisions, box, box_bus, dod, sot, connections, file_contents, asset_widget_map, settings, phase, plus per-Page-Ledger stewards as needed
Each runnable steward exposes POST /api/agents/<name>/run with audit-only and local-write modes
exit_criteria: Each high-risk Page Ledger has a steward (boxes, intake, automation, delegations, settings)
Each runnable steward has executed at least one successful run with receipts
/Subagent Boxes/ draft directory empty (or remaining contents are explicit no-ops)
Activity log shows steward run events for ≥5 distinct stewards over a 7-day window
do_not_leak_rules: No new top-level ledgers unless an open problem can't be resolved otherwise

target_structure.rule: Ledger files (LEDGERS/<NAME>.md + .json) STAY in place. Box governs via box.json.owns[] path reference. Moving them breaks Read-First protocol (do_not_undo_casually per DEC-015).

next_priorities: Author Boxes for missing-ledger stewards (communications, decisions, box, box_bus, dod, sot, connections, file_contents, asset_widget_map, settings, phase)

phase_c.purpose: Each Box gets a box.json manifest. Router runs. T1/T2/T3 interpreters dispatch. Propagation ledger records every routed entry. Triad becomes operational.
scope: Manifests for every existing Box (28 Client + 10 Staff + orchestrator + inbox-skill + ledger directory + app-ui root)
Build router daemon (or post-write hook on *.jsonl and ledger writes)
Wire T1 interpreters (deterministic schema-mapper) — ~80% of routing
Wire T2 interpreters (small-LLM template-summarizer) — ~15% of routing
Wire T3 interpreters (full sub-agent dispatch) — ~5% of routing
exit_criteria: Every active Box has a manifest registered with the router
Validation passes 100% of emits in a 24-hour window
T1 mapper handles a documented set of cross-ledger fan-outs without LLM cost
Cycle enforcement has caught ≥1 would-be cycle (proves check works)
Propagation ledger has 24+ hours of clean entries
phase_c.note: Final phase in the current arc. Next arc starts with fresh phasing decision when it arrives.

current_snapshot_2026_04_29.exit_readiness: All criteria met as of this ledger landing
current_snapshot_2026_04_29.architectural_lock: DEC-2026-04-29-002 (three-phase build) + DEC-2026-04-29-013 (Reactive Box Network runtime deferred to Phase C)

phase_transition_protocol: Update this ledger (flip current phase to complete; advance to next; bump Last updated)
Add Decisions Ledger entry declaring phase complete (load-bearing — unlocks next phase)
Append to activity ledger with kind: phase_transition
Re-read do-not-leak rule for new phase before proposing any new structural work
anti_patterns: 'This sub-agent will be quick to graduate, let me just do it now during Phase A' — NO. Sub-agent graduation is Phase B.

'The runtime is just one router daemon, let me prototype it during Phase A' — NO. Phase C runtime held until Phases A+B stable. Prototype-as-spec is fine (BOX_BUS_LEDGER.md); prototype-as-code is not.
'This Page Ledger pattern is so easy, let me batch all 14' — NO. Earned one at a time; better one well-grounded than 14 thin stubs.
'This Box needs a manifest, let me stamp it now' — NO. Manifest authoring is Phase C+1 backfill.
phase_aware_done_gate_questions: What phase is the project in right now? (Read this ledger current_snapshot.)
Is the proposed work in-phase or out-of-phase?
If out-of-phase: can it be reframed to in-phase scope, deferred until the right phase opens, or recorded as Open Problem?

related_ledgers.runtime_deferral_decision: DECISIONS_LEDGER.md DEC-2026-04-29-013 (Reactive Box Network runtime deferred to Phase C)
related_ledgers.completion_authority: DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md §11 (Phase Ledger row in Update Matrix)
related_ledgers.communications_promotion: COMM-2026-04-29-003 (three-phase build discipline — promoted to DEC-2026-04-29-002)

history.event: Phase 21 — initial creation. Phase A closer. Names current phase, exit criteria, do-not-leak rules, transition protocol, anti-patterns, phase-aware Done Gate questions. Tier: global. Companion files: PHASE.json. Companion Communications entry: COMM-2026-04-29-015. Phase A exit-ready as of this ledger landing — pending Decisions Ledger entry to declare complete.
Phase B opened. First unified Box landed at LEDGERS/BOXES/temporal_continuity/. Phase B target structure refined per DEC-2026-04-29-015 — replaces 'graduate to CCAgentindex/agents/<name>/' framing.
